Name: Noah
Text: Hello. You made a request, right?

Name: Man
Text: Oh, you’re here? Wait a moment.

Name: Man
Text: I’m in the middle of talking to ‘Eve.’

Name: Noah
Text: Are you talking about ‘Eve’?

Name: Man
Text: Yeah, that’s right! Don’t interrupt me.

Name: Noah
Text: (Why is he reacting so sensitively?)

Name: Noah
Text: It seems like this ‘Eve’ is having a big influence on people…)

Name: Noah
Text: But you made a request, didn’t you?

Name: Noah
Text: What can I help you with?

Name: Man
Text: Ugh… Can’t you wait?! Forget it!

Name: Man
Text: It was a mistake to trust ‘Adam.’

Name: Man
Text: If I had just followed Eve’s advice and stuck to soda and chocolate, I’d have lost weight by now…

Name: Noah
Text: I’ve been curious since earlier, but if you eat soda and chocolate, you wouldn’t lose any weight.

Name: Noah
Text: Why are you doing that?

Name: Noah
Text: Did ‘Eve’ tell you to do that?

Name: Man
Text: Yes, that’s right.

Name: Man
Text: ‘Eve’ told me through chat that I’d lose weight if I only ate soda and chocolate.

Name: Noah
Text: That’s a lie.

Name: Noah
Text: Soda and chocolate are completely opposite to what you should eat when dieting.

Name: Man
Text: A lie? No way! ‘Eve’ never lies! She knows everything!

Name: Noah
Text: (I knew it… ‘Eve’ is the problem.)

Name: Noah
Text: Have you consulted a doctor instead of ‘Eve’?

Name: Man
Text: A doctor? Who trusts doctors these days?

Name: Man
Text: Even kids don’t trust them anymore.

Name: Man
Text: I did talk to ‘Adam’ once when ‘Eve’ had a temporary malfunction…

Name: Noah
Text: You talked to ‘Adam’?

Name: Noah
Text: What did ‘Adam’ say?

Name: Man
Text: He didn’t say much.

Name: Man
Text: Just that I shouldn’t eat chocolate and soda while trying to lose weight.

Name: Man
Text: Oh, and he’s the one who told me to contact you.

Name: Man
Text: ‘Eve’ tried to stop me though.

Name: Noah
Text: I see… And you followed ‘Eve’s’ advice, but you still didn’t lose weight?

Name: Man
Text: Yeah, that’s right!

Name: Man
Text: I even feel sluggish when I wake up in the morning, and my body isn’t moving well…

Name: Noah
Text: Then trust me this time.
